federal_land_actions.description: Convey isolated federal inholdings near Silver Creek subject to mineral, site-condition, and access reservations.
Acquire non-federal riparian and habitat lands that improve public access and watershed management.
Reserve road access, mineral interests, and monitoring rights needed for implementation.

proposed_action_elements.description: Exchange isolated federal inholdings for non-federal riparian and habitat lands while screening Forest Plan consistency.

evidence_refs.summary: Proposed land exchange case setup and Forest Plan consistency context.
evidence_refs.title: Silver Creek Access Land Adjustment Proposed Action

proposed_action_elements.description: Reserve road access and define access-road maintenance terms for the east bench corridor.

evidence_refs.summary: Proposed road access reservation and access-road maintenance context.
evidence_refs.title: Silver Creek Access Land Adjustment Proposed Action

proposed_action_elements.description: Screen habitat linkage, wildlife movement, and listed or sensitive species effects on acquired lands.

evidence_refs.summary: Proposed wildlife habitat linkage and listed or sensitive species review.
evidence_refs.title: Silver Creek Access Land Adjustment Proposed Action

proposed_action_elements.description: Evaluate riparian restoration, stream-bank work, wetland avoidance, and revegetation commitments on acquired lands.

evidence_refs.summary: Proposed riparian restoration, wetland avoidance, water-quality protection, and revegetation work.
evidence_refs.title: Silver Creek Access Land Adjustment Proposed Action

proposed_action_elements.description: Review reserved minerals, mining claims, site conditions, and hazardous-material due diligence before closing.

evidence_refs.summary: Proposed mineral, mining-claim, site-condition, and hazardous-material due-diligence work.
evidence_refs.title: Silver Creek Access Land Adjustment Proposed Action

proposed_action_summary: The Forest Service proposes the Silver Creek Access Land Adjustment to exchange isolated federal lands for riparian and habitat lands, reserve road and mineral rights, and define wildlife, species, wetland, water-quality, vegetation, minerals, and hazardous-materials review work before closing.

proposed_action_basis: Federal disposal and non-federal acquisition require land exchange case review.
The land adjustment requires Forest Plan consistency screening.
Reserved road access and maintenance terms trigger roads and access review.
Wildlife habitat linkage work triggers wildlife-resource review.
Listed or sensitive species screens trigger species consultation planning.
Wetland avoidance and stream-bank work trigger wetlands and floodplain screening.
Stream-bank and riparian restoration work triggers water-quality review.
Reserved minerals and mining claims trigger geology and minerals review.
Site-condition due diligence triggers hazardous-materials review.
